zh: 我已经吃过早饭了。
en: I have already had breakfast.

zh: 她已经完成了作业。
en: She has already finished her homework.

zh: 他们已经到达了北京。
en: They have already arrived in Beijing.

zh: 我已经看过这部电影了。
en: I have already seen this movie.

zh: 他已经离开了。
en: He has already left.

zh: 我还没有吃午饭。
en: I have not had lunch yet.

zh: 她还没有回来。
en: She has not come back yet.

zh: 他们还没有做决定。
en: They have not made a decision yet.

zh: 你吃过日本料理吗？
en: Have you ever eaten Japanese food?

zh: 她去过法国吗？
en: Has she ever been to France?

zh: 你完成作业了吗？
en: Have you finished your homework?

zh: 是的，我已经完成了。
en: Yes, I have.

zh: 不，我还没有。
en: No, I have not.

zh: 他已经读过这本书三次了。
en: He has read this book three times.

zh: 我从未去过美国。
en: I have never been to America.

zh: 我已经在这里住了三年了。
en: I have lived here for three years.

zh: 她学英语已经学了五年了。
en: She has studied English for five years.

zh: 他们已经等了两个小时了。
en: They have waited for two hours.

zh: 我认识他已经十年了。
en: I have known him for ten years.

zh: 她自从毕业后就一直在这家公司工作。
en: She has worked in this company since she graduated.

zh: 自从上周以来，天气一直很好。
en: The weather has been nice since last week.

zh: 自从他离开后，我就没有见过他。
en: I have not seen him since he left.

zh: 他自从童年起就喜欢音乐。
en: He has liked music since childhood.

zh: 自从搬家后，她一直很忙。
en: She has been very busy since she moved.

zh: 自从2020年以来，他们一直是朋友。
en: They have been friends since 2020.

zh: 我刚刚完成了报告。
en: I have just finished the report.

zh: 她刚刚打来电话。
en: She has just called.

zh: 他们刚刚离开。
en: They have just left.

zh: 我去年去了上海，但我从未去过广州。
en: I went to Shanghai last year, but I have never been to Guangzhou.

zh: 她昨天买了一件裙子，但她还没有穿过它。
en: She bought a dress yesterday, but she has not worn it yet.

zh: 他上周完成了项目，现在他已经开始了新的工作。
en: He finished the project last week and has already started a new job.

zh: 我上个月学会了游泳，从那以后我一直在练习。
en: I learned to swim last month and have been practicing since then.

zh: 他们两年前搬到了这里，已经交了很多朋友。
en: They moved here two years ago and have made many friends.

zh: 她昨天见到了他，但自那以后就没有联系过他。
en: She saw him yesterday but has not contacted him since then.

zh: 我小时候去过长城，那是一次难忘的经历。
en: I visited the Great Wall when I was young. It was an unforgettable experience.

zh: 他三年前开始学钢琴，现在已经弹得很好了。
en: He started learning piano three years ago and can play it very well now.

zh: 我们上周末去了海边，玩得非常开心。
en: We went to the beach last weekend and had a great time.

zh: 她去年出版了她的第一本书，已经卖出了很多册。
en: She published her first book last year and it has sold many copies.

zh: 他在2018年加入了这家公司，从那以后一直表现出色。
en: He joined the company in 2018 and has performed well ever since.

zh: 我们昨天讨论了这个问题，但还没有找到解决方案。
en: We discussed the problem yesterday but have not found a solution yet.

zh: 她上个月开始节食，已经减了五公斤。
en: She started dieting last month and has lost five kilograms.

zh: 他们去年建了这座桥，它已经成为了地标。
en: They built this bridge last year and it has become a landmark.

zh: 我昨天丢了钱包，但幸运的是有人找到了它。
en: I lost my wallet yesterday, but luckily someone has found it.

zh: 她上周参加了比赛，赢得了第一名。
en: She took part in the competition last week and won first place.

zh: 他们五年前结婚了，一直过得很幸福。
en: They got married five years ago and have been very happy.
